info.title: Janis Economy and Finance Service
info.description:
Janis Economy and Finance Service

 **Last update**: 02 ene 26, 07:14 a. m.

post.description: Notify an Invoice failed for an Order, the order must be in status `readyForInvoice`.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: The Order ID from OMS Service

contents.description: Optional additional contents to save in operation log

get.summary: Get a simulation of the invoice form.
get.description: Get a simulation of the invoice form. The `simulation` property in the response body of this API can be used as request body for the create invoice API.

get.summary: Get a list of package movement
Get a Payment Method by identifier
Get a list of Payment Methods
Get a Payment Type by identifier
Get a list of Payment Types
Get a Point of sale by identifier

requestBody.description: The point of sale to update

get.summary: Get a list of Point of sale

post.summary: Create a new Point of sale

requestBody.description: The point of sale to create

post.description: Create a refund. A transaction will be created for this refund.

get.description: Get the settings available for a given entity

parameters.name: entity
parameters.description: The name of the entity that owns the settings to be retrieved

put.description: Update the settings available for a given entity

parameters.name: entity
parameters.description: The name of the entity that owns the settings to be updated

post.summary: Create a new Shift and start it

post.description: If the transactions are in the correct status "processed" and the corresponding order is in "delivered", it becomes "liquidated".

orderId.description: The unique identifier of the order from OMS Service

orderCommerceId.description: The transaction's related Order Commerce ID from OMS Service

orderCommerceSequentialId.description: The transaction's related Order Commerce Sequential ID from OMS Service

post.description: The transaction is advanced to "liquidated" if it is processed and the corresponding order is delivered.

get.summary: Get a Transaction Motive by identifier
Get a list of Transaction Motives

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

dateModified.description: The date of the last modification

dateCreatedDay.description: A range for creation day. It will filter from 00:00Hs to 23:59:59Hs of the given range

dateModifiedDay.description: A range for creation day. It will filter from 00:00Hs to 23:59:59Hs of the given range

userCreated.description: The ID of the user who created the item

userModified.description: The ID of the user who last modified the item

locationId.description: The Location unique identifier. **Location** `id`, this refet to **Janis Commerce Service**.

paymentMethodReferenceId.description: The PaymentMethod Reference ID. **PaymentMethod** `referenceId`. This is required if the **PaymentMethod** `id` is not sent.

isOnline.description: Indicates if the payment type must be validated online.

motiveReferenceId.description: The Transaction Motive Reference ID. **TransactionMotive** `referenceId`. This is required if the **Motive** `id` is not sent.

listAmounts.description: The amounts. The key is the PaymentMethod `id` and the value is the amount value

listPackagedAmounts.description: The packaged amounts. The key is the PaymentMethod `id` and the value is the amount value

invoiceItem.description: A item of an invoice detail.

currency.description: The ISO3 Code of the items's currency

referenceId.description: The ID of the item inside the order in the OMS Service

isComplement.description: Indicates if the item is a complement

orderCommerceId.description: The eCommerce ID of the order. This is required if `items` and `orderId` are not sent.

orderCommerceSequentialId.description: The transaction's related Order Commerce Sequential ID from OMS Service

orderId.description: The Order ID from OMS Service

FunctionTotals.description: The totals data. It is only available when `calculateTotals` parameter is active

total.description: The total items found in database applied filters

pages.description: The total pages for the filters applied

electronicInvoiceAccessKey.description: The access key for the electronic invoice. This field is for Brazil only.

currency.description: The ISO3 Code of the invoice's currency

value.description: The total amount of the invoice

orderIds.description: The internal ID's of the Orders where the invoice is generated

pointOfSaleId.description: The internal ID of the Point of sale where the invoice is generated. This takes precedence over `pointOfSaleReferenceId` if it is also sent. The `pointOfSaleReferenceId` will be overriden with the actual POS `referenceId`.

pointOfSaleReferenceId.description: The Reference ID of the Point of sale where the invoice is generated. If a point of sale with this `referenceId`` does not exist, it will be created.

paymentMethodId.description: The internal ID of the Payment method used to pay for the invoice. This takes precedence over `paymentMethodReferenceId` if it is also sent. The `paymentMethodReferenceId` will be overriden with the actual payment `referenceId`.

paymentMethodReferenceId.description: The Reference ID of the Payment method used to pay for the invoice.

shiftId.description: The internal ID of the shift where the invoice is generated.

locationId.description: The internal ID of the location used where the invoice was generated

issueDate.description: The date when the invoice was issued

url.description: An URL of the electronic invoice document

formId.description: The ID of the invoice form that was used to fetch the items

operatorName.description: The operator name that is billing

complements.description: Complements related to the invoice. The name of the property and its value must be specified

operatorNumber.description: The operator number that is billing

items.description: The items of the invoice. This field take precedence over `orderId` and `orderCommerceId` if they are also sent.

invoiceOrderId.description: The internal ID of the Order for which the invoice is or was generated. This is required if `items` is not sent and takes precedence over 'orderCommerceId' if it is also sent.

isPartialInvoice.description: Indicates if this invoice is partial

orderId.description: The internal ID of the order from OMS

orderCommerceId.description: The Commerce ID of the order

index.description: The numeric index of the form for this order starting in 001 (left padded with zeroes until 3 characters)

currency.description: The ISO3 Code of the invoice form's currency

value.description: The total amount of the invoice form

items.description: The items included in this form
The items included in this form

InvoiceFormSimulationItem.description: An item of the form invoicing simulation

quantity.description: The quantity of this item to invoice

PackagePut.description: The information to update a package

packagedBy.description: The Package `id` that contains this Package

previousPointOfSale.description: The package movement's previous point of sale identifier

currentPointOfSale.description: The package movement's current point of sale identifier

previousShift.description: The package movement's previous shift identifier

currentShift.description: The package movement's current shift identifier

paymentType.description: The Payment type's `id` associated with the payment method. See [Payment Type](/v2/service/jef#tag/Payment-Type)

allowUpselling.description: Indicates if the payment method allows upselling. Default value will be `true`.

upsellingThreshold.description: The upselling threshold for the payment method. Default value will be `0`.

isOnlinePayment.description: Indicates if the payment type must be validated online

isPaymentUponDelivery.description: Indicates if the payment type must be validated upon delivery

isOnlinePaymentUponDelivery.description: Indicates if the online payment type must be validated upon delivery

locationReferenceId.description: The point of sale location reference identifier

referenceId.description: The point of sale reference identifier

rmaId.description: The ID of the RMA that requested the refund

isFullRefunded.description: Indicates if the refund is a full refund of the Order

useOrderPickingLocation.description: Indicates if Transactions processed without Location should autocomplete it with the Order picking location

confirmEndedShift.description: Required confirmation for ending the shift

referenceId.description: The transaction's external identifier, for example the ID of the commerce platform

orderIds.description: The transaction's related order IDs from OMS Service

refundMotive.description: The refund motive of the transaction (only for refund transaction types)

packagedAmount.description:
Determines if the amount value is pacakged in a **Package**
* If `true` the `id` of the **Package** can be found in field `package`

isInternal.description: The transaction motive is internal value

id.name: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the item

FunctionsFilters.description: The filters to apply to the model

schema.description: The filters to apply to the model

FunctionsCalculateTotals.name: calculateTotals
FunctionsCalculateTotals.description: Indicates if the response must return the totals data applied filters. **Default** `false`

FunctionsAllItems.name: allItems
FunctionsAllItems.description: Indicates if the response must return all items. **Default** `false`

InvoiceFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

issueDateRange.description: A range for issue date. It will filter from 00:00Hs to 23:59:59Hs of the given range

dateCreatedRange.description: A range for date created. It will filter from 00:00Hs to 23:59:59Hs of the given range

InvoiceFormFilters.name: filters
InvoiceFormFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

LocationFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

PackageFilters.name: filters
PackageFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

PackageMovementFilters.name: filters
PackageMovementFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

PaymentMethodFilters.name: filters
PaymentMethodFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

allowUpselling.description: Indicates if the payment method allows upselling. Default value will be `true`.

PaymentTypeFilters.name: filters
PaymentTypeFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

PointOfSaleFilters.name: filters
PointOfSaleFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

RefundFilters.name: filters
RefundFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

dateRange.description: A range for refund date. It will filter from 00:00Hs to 23:59:59Hs of the given range

dateCreatedRange.description: A range for date created. It will filter from 00:00Hs to 23:59:59Hs of the given range

ShiftFilters.name: filters
ShiftFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

TransactionFilters.name: filters
TransactionFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

transaction.description: Allows to filter between Positive or Negative Transactions

orderId.description: The transaction's related order ID from OMS Service

dateCreatedDay.description:
A range for creation day. It will filter from 00:00Hs to 23:59:59Hs of the given range.

If this filter is not sent, by default the results are limited to one month from the current date.

TransactionMotiveFilters.name: filters
TransactionMotiveFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

ValueTransporterFilters.name: filters
ValueTransporterFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

x-janis-total.description: The total amount of records in the list

Conflict.description: The request can not be satisfied because the current state is incompatible with what is required
